title: solidago sempervirens subsp. mexicana
intro: Solidago sempervirens subsp. mexicana, also known as Mexican goldenrod, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Solidago sempervirens subsp. mexicana can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
